codeReview.summary: This fix does not close the prior blocking gap: the added tests still verify store/data behavior only and do not assert DashboardQuickSwitchView error-branch rendering or actionable controls in the actual view surface.

issues.description: New tests (`test_errorStateRecovery_actionsAvailable`, `test_errorState_vs_emptyState_areDistinct`, `test_retryAction_reloadsData`, `test_openSettingsAction_isAvailable`) exercise DataStore CRUD/fetch semantics without instantiating `DashboardQuickSwitchView` or asserting visible error UI/actions (`Retry`, `Open Settings`). They would still pass if the view's error rendering branch/regression reappeared.

`test_storeFetchFailure_triggersErrorState` does not induce a throwing `fetchAllProfiles` path or assert any error-state rendering/action contract; it only checks benign nil/non-throw behavior on unrelated store calls, so the required load-error UI contract remains untested.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked `followedProcedure: true`, but required broad validation and manual UI sanity checks from `switcher-ui-worker` were not evidenced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requires step 6 scoped + `scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh` and step 7 manual checks; handoff `2026-04-09T19-07-49-769Z__fast-surfaces-add-dashboard-error-ui-render-tests__6f9c4f33-1bff-4ef7-960b-ee21e64a01e0.json` lists only scoped `xcodebuild test` and `interactiveChecks: []`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill handoff-discipline requires full 40-char SHA in `commitId`, but this handoff uses a short hash while claiming procedure adherence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: switcher-ui-worker SKILL.md 'Handoff Discipline Requirements' mandates full SHA; handoff `commitId` is `8096a51`.

summary: Reviewed prior failed scrutiny context, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill, and commit `8096a517...`. The added tests do not verify actual DashboardQuickSwitchView load-error rendering/actions, so the original blocking test-contract failure remains unresolved.
